label: R/W Verification Test
info:
Automated read/write verification for all scalar datatypes in plc/s7-1500.
Press the "Run all R/W tests" inject. The Test Runner writes every constant value of every datatype into the matching *_write tag, reads it back and compares write vs. read-back.
The run never aborts on a failure: it completes fully and emits one result per datatype ("Datatype Result") plus a final "Summary".
DTL round-trips as Date (ms resolution).
Regenerate with: node scripts/generate-rw-test-flow.js

name: R/W verification — write, read back and compare every scalar constant
Test Runner
